summary: Google Places + Maps Pattern C enrichment shipped and validated for the live activities path on GKE. The remaining AMBER is upstream Amadeus test API 500s for locations/hotels before enrichment can run, not a Google auth or widget-rendering failure.

ops.title: feat(travel-agent): add Google Places + Maps as opt-in enrichment layer
fix(travel-agent): bind Google Places MCP workload inputs
fix(travel-agent): publish Google Places helper constants
fix(travel-agent): expose Google Places data for agent hops
fix(travel-agent): keep Google enrichment payload compact

docs.title: docs(tutorials): note Google Places travel enrichment

backend_oauth_places_probe.note: Worker pod ADC successfully called Places searchText with X-Goog-User-Project.

widget_key_probe.blank_referer_note: Blank referer also returned 200 for this endpoint/key; bad referer 403 confirmed the configured restriction is active.

travel_locations_enriched.note: Amadeus test API failed before Google enrichment could run.

travel_hotels_enriched.note: Amadeus test API failed before Google enrichment could run.

fix_forwards.issue: MCP tool inputs were not bound into the playbook step scope.
fix_forwards.fix: ops#79 added tool.input bindings for method, tool, arguments, google_project, widget_key_secret, and max_enrichments.

fix_forwards.issue: Python helper constants were not visible from helper functions because NoETL executes code with separate globals/locals.
fix_forwards.fix: ops#80 republished constants and modules through globals().update(...).

fix_forwards.issue: Agent-hop parent did not receive the child playbook's result data.
fix_forwards.fix: ops#81 emitted control_data alongside data from Google Places MCP responses.

fix_forwards.issue: Large Place Photo payloads could externalize into references while the GKE object-store pod is intentionally stopped for cost control.
fix_forwards.fix: ops#82 removed photos from search fields and used compact Maps Static URLs for enrichment thumbnails.

verdict: Code/docs are merged, Pattern C auth is proven, default OFF is proven, activities enrichment is GREEN, and failure is non-blocking. Full all-intent GREEN is blocked by the known Amadeus test API 500s on locations/hotels.
